products.name: Letter of Explanation Kit
products.customer_situation: You need one downloadable kit with multiple explanation-letter templates for credit, income, employment, address, rental, late-payment, bank-statement, life-event, or general application questions.
products.outcome: Download the PDF guide and editable DOCX kit, choose the explanation-letter template that fits, fill it in yourself, review it, and send it when ready.
products.description: Pay $39 once and download the Letter of Explanation Kit. The kit includes a PDF guide and editable DOCX templates covering 9 explanation-letter situations: credit explanation, income gap, employment gap, address history, rental issue, late payment, bank statement, life event, and general application explanation. The free Studio is optional and not required to buy or use the kit. ApprovalPrep does not contact anyone for you, repair credit, give legal advice, create fake documents, or promise approval. This is a direct paid download: after checkout, you unlock the PDF guide and editable DOCX file for this kit. The free Studio is optional and not required to buy or use any paid kit.

editable DOCX templates for 9 explanation-letter situations
what to attach and what to avoid
